Handheld cinematic realism shot of SCARLETT in casual light-colored top with high-waisted linen shorts captured mid-stride passing through an open studio doorway into bright morning street light, right hand slipping the lipstick tube from (CORAL_LIPSTICK) into the pocket of her linen shorts at the exact threshold moment, urban coastal street with sunlit pavement and studio facade visible behind, harsh bright daylight pouring across the scene creating crisp directional shadows on the ground, natural cinematic realism with handheld energy, bright unfiltered morning sunlight, eye-level following angle with shallow depth of field keeping the action sharp against softly blurred background street details

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. STREET OUTSIDE STUDIO - MORNING - Bright street outside a studio doorway transitioning into open daylight
    - Image 3 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - Slim elegant lipstick tube with smooth cylindrical metallic casing in soft coral-pink finish
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
